title: centella macrocarpa var. saxatilis
intro: Centella macrocarpa var. saxatilis, commonly known as Gotu Kola or Centella, is a type of perennial plant native to Australia and Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting skin health, due to its high content of triterpenoid saponins. Herbal preparations of Centella macrocarpa var. saxatilis include tea, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
